accounts.name: lp_dead_ata
docs: Dead address ATA — permanently locked MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY on first deposit.

accounts.name: lp_user_info
docs: Per-user continuous oSOLA reward state for this pool.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — needed to sign the oSOLA mint CPI.

accounts.name: o_sola_mint
docs: oSOLA mint — auto-harvested rewards are minted here.

accounts.name: user_o_sola
docs: User's oSOLA ATA — receives auto-harvested rewards.

accounts.name: user_token_in
docs: User's input token ATA (token_a if a_to_b, token_b otherwise).

accounts.name: user_token_out
docs: User's output token ATA.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Protocol market vault — receives the protocol fee portion (in input token).

instructions.name: checkpoint_lp
docs: Record a time-weighted LP balance snapshot for the caller in a given pool+epoch.
Must be called before the epoch ends; updates both the user and pool accumulators.

instructions.name: claim_bribe
docs: Claim pro-rata bribe after the voting epoch has ended.
claimable = total_bribed × user_votes / total_votes  (safe u128 muldiv)
Creating UserBribeClaim PDA is the idempotency guard (init = fails if exists).

accounts.name: user_reward_ata
docs: Destination — created if the user doesn't already hold this token.

accounts.name: user_bribe_claim
docs: Created by this instruction — its existence is the double-claim guard.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: User's hiSOLA balance determines their fee share.

instructions.name: claim_lp_emissions
docs: Mint a user's pro-rata oSOLA share from LP emissions for a given pool+epoch.
Requires: epoch finalized, user checkpointed during epoch, not yet claimed.

instructions.name: claim_lp_rewards
docs: Claim accumulated oSOLA LP rewards without changing liquidity.

accounts.name: user_lp
docs: User's LP balance — determines the reward share.

instructions.name: collect_to_pol
docs: Redirect a portion of market_vault fees to pol_usdc_vault. Authority-only.

instructions.name: deploy_pol
docs: Buy SOLA via bonding curve and/or add LP to the target pool. Authority-only.

accounts.name: pol_state
docs: PolState — not mutated here; used only as a PDA signer.

accounts.name: pol_lp_vault
docs: Created on first deploy_pol call; LP tokens are held here permanently.

instructions.name: deposit_bribe
docs: Permissionless: any protocol deposits bribe tokens to attract hiSOLA votes.
epoch must equal the current epoch — bribes target the live voting window.

accounts.name: bribe_vault
docs: Bribe metadata account. init_if_needed = multiple depositors additive.

accounts.name: bribe_token_vault
docs: Token account holding the deposited bribe tokens. Owned by bribe_vault PDA.

instructions.name: emit_pool_rewards
docs: Finalize the LP emission allocation for one pool after its epoch has ended.
Permissionless — anyone can call. Records how much oSOLA this pool's LPs may claim.

accounts.name: gauge_state
docs: Gauge for this pool — requires voters used the AMM pool address as pool_id.

instructions.name: initialize_pol
docs: One-time setup: create PolState and its token vaults. Authority-only.

accounts.name: pol_usdc_vault
docs: USDC accumulator vault — receives collect_to_pol transfers.

accounts.name: pol_sola_ata
docs: Staging account for SOLA bought before LP deployment.

instructions.name: lock_hi_sola
docs: Lock hiSOLA for ve-weighted governance power.
Subsequent calls extend the lock or add tokens (never shorten).

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Caller's hiSOLA ATA — source of tokens to lock.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Lock metadata PDA. Created on first lock, updated on subsequent ones.

accounts.name: ve_lock_vault
docs: Token account holding locked hiSOLA. Owned by the lock_position PDA.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only market vault snapshot for accumulator advance.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market vault — read-only snapshot for accumulator advance before issuing hiSOLA.

accounts.name: founder
docs: Founder wallet — hardcoded address, cannot be substituted.

accounts.name: user_token_a
docs: User's token-A ATA (must already exist).

accounts.name: user_token_b
docs: User's token-B ATA (must already exist).

accounts.name: lp_user_info
docs: Per-user continuous oSOLA reward state for this pool.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — needed to sign the oSOLA mint CPI.

accounts.name: o_sola_mint
docs: oSOLA mint — auto-harvested rewards are minted here.

accounts.name: user_o_sola
docs: User's oSOLA ATA — receives auto-harvested rewards.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market vault needed to snapshot the accumulator on stake entry.

instructions.name: unlock_hi_sola
docs: Return locked hiSOLA after expiry. Restores tokens to the fee pool.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Destination for unlocked hiSOLA. Created if user burned their ATA previously.

accounts.name: ve_lock_vault
docs: Source vault — tokens transferred back to user on unlock.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only market vault snapshot for accumulator advance.

instructions.name: vote_gauge
docs: hiSOLA holder directs vote-weight at a pool gauge for the current epoch.
Total allocated across all pools ≤ raw hiSOLA + ve-weighted locked hiSOLA.
One UserVoteReceipt per (user, pool, epoch) — double-vote for same pool is blocked.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Caller's hiSOLA balance determines base vote power.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Pass any account (e.g. SystemProgram) when not using a ve lock.
If valid and unexpired, adds ve-weighted power to the vote cap.

accounts.name: gauge_state
docs: Aggregate votes for this pool this epoch.

accounts.name: user_vote_receipt
docs: One receipt per (user, pool, epoch). init = fails on second vote for same pool.

accounts.name: user_epoch_votes
docs: Cumulative allocation tracker — prevents over-voting across pools.

accounts.name: global_epoch_votes
docs: Global vote total for the epoch — denominator for LP emission splits.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol authority

errors.name: WrongEpoch
errors.msg: Epoch argument does not match current on-chain epoch

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Epoch has not ended yet — claim after the epoch rolls over

errors.name: VoteOverflow
errors.msg: Vote amount exceeds available hiSOLA balance for this epoch

errors.name: InvalidPoolTokens
errors.msg: Invalid pool tokens: same mint or unsorted mints

errors.name: ZeroLiquidity
errors.msg: Zero liquidity: deposit amounts must be non-zero

errors.name: EpochNotFinalized
errors.msg: Pool epoch rewards not finalized — call emit_pool_rewards first

errors.name: NoVotes
errors.msg: No votes recorded for this pool/epoch — cannot distribute emissions

types.name: BribeVault
docs: Bribe pot for one (pool_id, reward_mint, epoch) triplet.
Permissionless — any protocol can deposit. Multiple deposits per epoch are additive.
PDA: [b"bribe_vault", pool_id, reward_mint, epoch_le8]

types.name: GaugeState
docs: Aggregate hiSOLA vote-weight directed at a pool for one epoch.
PDA: [b"gauge", pool_id, epoch_le8]

types.name: GlobalEpochVotes
docs: Total hiSOLA vote-weight cast across ALL pools in one epoch.
Used as denominator when splitting LP_EMISSION_PER_EPOCH across pools.
PDA: [b"epoch_votes", epoch_le8]

types.name: LpEpochClaim
docs: Proof-of-claim for LP emissions — created by claim_lp_emissions, blocks replay.
PDA: [b"lp_claim", user, pool, epoch_le8]

types.name: LpPoolEpochAccum
docs: Time-weighted total LP supply for one pool in one epoch.
Finalized by emit_pool_rewards after epoch ends; records oSOLA allocation.
PDA: [b"lp_pool_epoch", pool, epoch_le8]

types.name: LpUserCheckpoint
docs: Continuous time-weighted LP balance for one (user, pool) pair.
Accumulates: weighted_balance += lp_balance × elapsed_secs each checkpoint.
Reset to 0 at the start of each new epoch.
PDA: [b"lp_ckpt", pool, user]

types.name: LpUserInfo
docs: Per-user oSOLA reward state for one (user, pool) pair.
Created on first add_liquidity, claim_lp_rewards, or remove_liquidity.
PDA: [b"lp_user", pool, user]

types.name: PolState
docs: Singleton PDA controlling protocol-owned liquidity.
PDA: [b"pol"]

fields.name: pol_split_bps
docs: Suggested % of market_vault fees to divert (informational, enforced off-chain).

fields.name: target_pool
docs: AmmPool PDA that receives POL liquidity deposits.

fields.name: usdc_accumulated
docs: Lifetime USDC routed through collect_to_pol.

fields.name: founder_allocated
docs: Prevents mint_founder_allocation from being called more than once.

types.name: UserBribeClaim
docs: Created during claim_bribe — its existence proves the claim was made.
PDA: [b"bribe_claim", user, pool_id, reward_mint, epoch_le8]

types.name: UserEpochVotes
docs: Tracks total vote-weight already allocated by one user in an epoch (across all pools).
Prevents voting more than the user's hiSOLA balance.
PDA: [b"uev", user, epoch_le8]

types.name: UserVoteReceipt
docs: Records one user's vote for a specific (pool, epoch) pair.
Created with `init` — immutable once written, prevents double-voting for same pool.
PDA: [b"vote", user, pool_id, epoch_le8]

types.name: VeLockPosition
docs: Per-user lock state for ve-weighted governance.
Locking hiSOLA transfers tokens to ve_lock_vault and removes them from the
fee accumulator denominator. Locked hiSOLA earns ve voting power instead.
PDA: [b"velock", user]
